title: 6 netstat Commands for Quick Network Inspection
summary: Inspect connections and listening ports faster with netstat commands for socket state checks, routing tables, interface counters, and protocol statistics.

test_environment.runtime: netstat available on the local system

verification_setup: Use a machine with active listeners or network connections for meaningful output.
Check which socket-state words your platform uses before relying on grep filters.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/netstat_commands_for_quick_network_inspection.sh on a real local machine.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Run on the target machine; socket-state output varies by operating system.
